ksa_text: Skill in designing model performance monitoring systems, including detection of performance degradation, data distribution shifts, and concept drift that trigger model retraining.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to LLM Evaluator scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("model perform", "performance.{0,15} ?:degrad|drift"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External check: no matches in RSK job postings or cert curricula (CRISC, FRM, NIST AI RMF, CISM). Would a working LLM Evaluator self-report this as required?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Challenge answered: the competency is implicit in LLM Evaluator work (domain affinity 0.85, 2 RSK signal(s)). Framework vocabulary matching systematically underrepresents risk management and governance KSAs.
